a.content: Adriatic Foods will expand the pilot to the Split warehouse in Q3.
a.source: Adriatic Foods agreed to expand the pilot to the Split warehouse in Q3.

b.content: Adriatic Foods completed the pilot in the Zagreb warehouse.
b.source: The Zagreb warehouse pilot at Adriatic Foods wrapped up successfully.

notes: COMPATIBLE TRAP: same subject, same pilot, similar wording — but different sites and phases. Both true; flagging this wastes the user's attention.
